---
title: "PP Model Code"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
source("cleaning.R")

sector_panel <- cumu_returns %>%
  select(date, sector_name, cum_log_return)

market_series <- cumu_returns_sp500 %>%
  select(date, market_cum_log_return = cum_log_return)

model_data_long <- sector_panel %>%
  inner_join(market_series, by = "date") %>%
  arrange(sector_name, date)

model_data_long %>%
  count(sector_name)
```

```{r}
y_wide <- model_data_long %>%
  select(date, sector_name, cum_log_return) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = date, values_from = cum_log_return) %>%
  arrange(sector_name)

sector_names <- y_wide$sector_name
y_mat <- y_wide %>%
  select(-sector_name) %>%
  as.matrix()

m_vec <- model_data_long %>%
  distinct(date, market_cum_log_return) %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  pull(market_cum_log_return)

```

```{r}
# finding gamma priors
all_y <- as.vector(y_mat)

mean_y <- mean(all_y, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_y   <- sd(all_y, na.rm = TRUE)
var_y  <- var(all_y, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_prec <- 1 / var_y
sd_prec   <- mean_prec / 2 
a_tau <- (mean_prec / sd_prec)^2
b_tau <- mean_prec / (sd_prec^2)

stan_data <- list(
  N = nrow(y_mat),
  T = ncol(y_mat),
  y = y_mat,
  m = m_vec,
  a_tau = a_tau,
  b_tau = b_tau
)

fit <- stan(
  file = "pp_model_4_23.stan",
  data = stan_data,
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  seed = 123,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12)
)

```

```{r}
# this gives results for each sector
print(fit, pars = c("phi", "beta"), probs = c(0.025, 0.5, 0.975))

traceplot(fit, pars = "phi")
traceplot(fit, pars = "beta")

stan_ac(fit, pars = "phi")
stan_ac(fit, pars = "beta")
```
